title: Crash occurs in case when use write_firrtl command for design with $memwr and $memrd cells.

features.name: inferred RAM array with write-enable port
features.description: Code should include a reg array used as RAM with synchronous write-enable logic, where a conditional block performs array write and the same always block also reads from the array

features.name: partial-width address bus on memory access
features.description: Code should include a memory array addressed by a port whose bit width is not a full power-of-two width, such as a 6-bit address bus indexing a 64-entry array declared as [6:1]

features.name: write-through to output during conditional memory write
features.description: Code should include a synchronous always block where the output register is assigned the input data inside the write-enable condition block, while also being assigned from the memory array outside the condition, creating a write-through and read pattern
